personas.name: Frustated Regular user
personas.description: A user who frequently uses the app for meditation but experiences crashes and glitches.
context: Using the app daily for meditation

personas.name: Paywall Blocked Free User
personas.description: A user who wants to try the contents of the app but is limited by paywalls.
goals: Explore the app before committing to payment
Access basic meditation content for free
pain_points: Too many features locked behind a subscription
Cannot evaluate the app properly without paying
context: Trying the app for the first time
constraints: Needs access to some free content
Unwilling to pay before trying the app

personas.name: Prices Concerned Subscriber
personas.description: A user who is worried about unexpected charges and full subscription fees and unclear subscription policies.
pain_points: Charged after free trial without clear notice
constraints: Must be notified before charges occur

personas.name: Overwhelmed User
personas.description: A user who finds the app interface cluttered and difficult to navigate.
context: Trying to locate specific meditation or sleep features
constraints: Key features should be easy to find

personas.name: Mental Health Improvement Seeking User
personas.description: A user who uses the app to improve their mental health and well-being.
pain_points: Needs consistent access to helpful content
Relies on app quality for personal mental health improvement
context: Using the app daily or regularly
Engaging with meditation and wellness content
constraints: Content must be available and relevant
Experience should be smooth and supportive
